abilities.description: Removes movement speed limit and allows free pathing through trees.

hint: Movement speed bonuses from multiple pairs of boots do not stack.

demonicon.name: Book of the Dead
demonicon.lore: A record of the final reckoning. With one page torn out.
demonicon.notes:
The Demonic Warrior has 1600 Health, 4 Armor, 40% Magic Resistance, 380 Movement Speed, 134 Attack Damage, 50 Mana Burn on Hit, 800 Damage on Death, and 1000 True Sight Radius.
The Demonic Archer has 1300 Health, 4 Armor, 40% Magic Resistance, 425 Movement Speed, 131 Attack Damage, a basic dispel ability with a slow on a 15s Cooldown, and a 9% Bonus Movement Speed Aura.

abilities.title: Greater Demonic Summoning
abilities.description: Summon 2 demonic warriors and 2 demonic archers that last 65 seconds. The Warrior burns mana every hit, reveals invisible units, and deals magical damage to whoever kills it. The Archer has a basic dispel ability with a slow and a passive movement speed aura.

fallen_sky.name: Fallen Sky
fallen_sky.lore: One of the few surviving creations of the acolytes of the Wyrmforge.

abilities.title: Fallen Sky
abilities.description:
Transform into a meteor that strikes down at the target area after 1 seconds in a 315 AoE, stunning enemies for 1.6 seconds and dealing impact damage. Continues to deal damage every 1 seconds to enemy units and buildings for 6 seconds.

Building Impact Damage: 75 
Building Over Time Damage: 60 

Non-Building Impact Damage: 150 
Non-Building Over Time Damage: 60

Fallen Sky cannot be used for 3 seconds after taking damage from an enemy hero or Roshan.

pirate_hat.name: Pirate Hat
pirate_hat.lore: A salty skulltopper cursed with endless good fortune.

abilities.title: Plunder
abilities.description: Steals 150 gold from enemy heroes that die within 2400 units. If the wearer is the killer, there is no range limit and an additional 400 gold is stolen.

abilities.title: Buried Treasure
abilities.description: Gold loss on death reduced by 100%.

ex_machina.name: Ex Machina
ex_machina.lore: The remains of an ancient universe, preserved within a single sphere.

abilities.title: Reset Cooldowns
abilities.description: Reset the cooldown on all items (except Refresher Orb).

faded_broach.name: Faded Broach
faded_broach.lore: A life-saving jewel bestowed upon a young queen by a kindly vizier.

paladin_sword.name: Paladin Sword
paladin_sword.lore: The sigil blade of the legendary Brother Yhols of Gausra, stripped from its scabbard on the day of his controversial excommunication.

minotaur_horn.name: Minotaur Horn
minotaur_horn.lore: The trophy from a mighty beast ambushed and slain in the recesses of its own home.

abilities.title: Lesser Avatar
abilities.description:
Applies a basic dispel. Grants 50% magic resistance and immunity to reflected and pure damage for 2s. For the duration of the effect, any negative effect from enemy spells has no effect.

Dispel Type: Basic Dispel

orb_of_destruction.name: Orb of Destruction
orb_of_destruction.lore: An ingot of chaos suspended in wizard's ether, housed within an arcanist's orb.

abilities.title: Impeding Corruption
abilities.description: Attacks reduce the target's armor and movement speed. Slow amount varies based on whether the wearer is melee or ranged.

the_leveller.name: The Leveller
the_leveller.lore: A demonic blade that struck the final blow to crack the gates of the Sanctum of Solanas.

abilities.title: Level
abilities.description: Attacks deal 35% more damage to buildings.

arcane_ring.name: Arcane Ring
arcane_ring.lore: Once a prized heirloom of a minor lord's house.

abilities.title: Replenish Mana
abilities.description:
Restores mana equal to 30 + 3% of the caster's maximum mana pool to all nearby allies. 

 Radius: 1200

titan_sliver.name: Titan Sliver
titan_sliver.lore: Though many desire this brilliant shard for its obvious qualities, a school of study exists to determine the true size and purpose of its incomprehensible whole.

chipped_vest.name: Chipped Vest
chipped_vest.lore: It doesn't look like much, but it's oddly comfy.
chipped_vest.notes: Damage done by this item is considered reflected damage. Reflected damage does not provide any lifesteal and cannot be reflected.

abilities.title: Chipper
abilities.description: Every time you are attacked, you return 30 damage to heroes and 15 damage to creeps.

elven_tunic.name: Elven Tunic
elven_tunic.lore: Even simple items of elven make seem imbued with inexplicable efficacy.

cloak_of_flames.name: Cloak of Flames
cloak_of_flames.lore: A very fine cloak that plays host to an overly-protective living flame.

abilities.title: Immolate
abilities.description: Burns enemy units in a 375 unit radius for 40 damage per second. Illusions deal 25 damage per second.

trickster_cloak.name: Trickster Cloak
trickster_cloak.lore: A fantastic garment immediately misplaced by its creator upon completion.

abilities.title: Cloak
abilities.description: Causes you to become invisible for 6 seconds.

possessed_mask.name: Possessed Mask
possessed_mask.lore: Even when discarded with specific purpose and great care, this frightening mask always finds its way onto the face of a new owner.
possessed_mask.notes: Grants 1/3rd of the value to each attribute for Universal Heroes.

abilities.title: Lifesteal
abilities.description: Heals the attacker for 5 HP on each attack.

penta_edged_sword.name: Penta-Edged Sword
penta_edged_sword.lore: The final, twisted work of a severely pious blacksmith, completed immediately before the taking of his own life.

abilities.title: Maim
abilities.description: Each attack has a 25% chance to reduce enemy hero movement speed by 20% and attack speed by 60 for 3 seconds.

bullwhip.name: Bullwhip
bullwhip.lore: Once the favored lash of an infamous broker of pit fighters and other live trade.
bullwhip.notes: Does not trigger spell block or spell reflect.

abilities.title: Whip
abilities.description: Grants 25% movement speed when cast on allies, and slows by 25% when cast on enemies. Lasts 4 seconds.

psychic_headband.name: Psychic Headband
psychic_headband.lore: A failed experiment in finer telekinetic control, still fit for other ends.
psychic_headband.notes: Does not trigger spell block or spell reflect.

abilities.title: Psychic Push
abilities.description: Pushes the target enemy unit away from you 400 distance.

ceremonial_robe.name: Ceremonial Robe
ceremonial_robe.lore: One of many items lost in the looting of Zelenwyr's sacred reliquary.

abilities.title: Ceremonial Aura
abilities.description:
Lowers enemy Status Resistance by 10% and Magic Resistance by 10%.

Radius: 1200

quicksilver_amulet.name: Quicksilver Amulet
quicksilver_amulet.lore: An enchanted talisman brimming with a mysterious substance.

abilities.title: Quicksilver
abilities.description: Grants you a bonus 5% movement speed and 20 attack speed anytime one of your abilities are on cooldown.

book_of_shadows.name: Book of Shadows
book_of_shadows.lore: An impossible tome filled with unreadable prose of unknowable thoughts.
book_of_shadows.notes: Does not trigger spell block or spell reflect.

abilities.title: Shadows
abilities.description: Target an enemy, ally or self. Causes the target to become untargetable from enemies to the caster, but also silenced, muted and disarmed for 4 seconds. Applies a Basic Dispel.

hint: Dispel Type: Basic Dispel

giants_ring.name: Giant's Ring
giants_ring.lore: Prized procurement of an otherwise unremarkable ruler of Elze who abdicated his position and vanished.

abilities.title: Giant's Foot
abilities.description: Can path over any terrain and deals 100% of your strength per second to units you are standing ontop of.

stormcrafter.name: Stormcrafter
stormcrafter.lore: The accidental byproduct of a spell conjured to entrap a lesser god.

abilities.title: Bottled Lightning
abilities.description: Zaps 2 enemy targets within 700 range, dealing 70 damage and a 40% slow for 0.4 seconds.

mysterious_hat.name: Fairy's Trinket
mysterious_hat.lore: A small token imbued with the fortune of the fae in recognition of an intriguing display of mortal kindness.

ascetic_cap.name: Ascetic's Cap
ascetic_cap.lore: An austere hat thought to be of Turstarkuri origin.

abilities.title: Endurance
abilities.description: Whenever a debuff would be applied to the owner, grant %status_resistance% Status resistance and %slow_resistance%% Slow Resistance for %uration% seconds.

misericorde.name: Brigand's Blade
misericorde.lore: An infamous assassin's blade stolen and smuggled out of White Spire after its owner's mysterious demise.

abilities.title: Dark Mercy
abilities.description: Your attacks deal 3 more damage to enemies for each 7% HP they are missing.

heavy_blade.name: Witchbane
heavy_blade.lore: With ready access to test subjects, untold cruelties have been dreamed up and loosed upon the world from within the walls of the Tyler Estate.

abilities.title: Cleanse
abilities.description:
Dispel all enemies and allies in a 300 unit radius.

Dispel Type: Basic Dispel

abilities.title: Subjugate
abilities.description: Your attacks deal bonus magical damage equal to 4% of your target's Max Mana.

unstable_wand.name: Pig Pole
unstable_wand.lore: A makeshift charm misplaced by a peace-loving, addlebrained enchanter.

abilities.title: Pig, Out!
abilities.description: Turns your hero into a critter for 3 seconds and gives them +20% Movement Speed.

pogo_stick.name: Tumbler's Toy
pogo_stick.lore: An antique plaything found in the ruins of an Ozenja circus bazaar.

abilities.title: Vault
abilities.description: Propels your hero forward 300 units. Tumbler's Toy gets disabled for 3 seconds if its owner receives damage from a player source.

paintball.name: Fae Grenade
paintball.lore: Those marked for death by the fae shine brightly to all manner of creatures in the shadow realm.
paintball.notes: Does not trigger spell block or spell reflect.

abilities.title: Shadow Brand
abilities.description: Throws a Mark towards an enemy within 900 range applying a debuff that deals 40 damage every second and provides vision of the unit for 7 seconds.

seeds_of_serenity.name: Seeds of Serenity
seeds_of_serenity.lore: An evergreen sprout treasured by the woodkin and highly coveted by interlopers and their like.

abilities.title: Verdurous Dale
abilities.description: Target the ground with a 400 radius. Provides health regeneration to all allied units while they are in the area of effect equal to 8 + 25% of the caster's health regeneration at the time of casting. Lasts 8 seconds.

lance_of_pursuit.name: Lance of Pursuit
lance_of_pursuit.lore: The gleaming weapon of a tarnished knight haunted by his duties to an unworthy king.

abilities.title: Hound
abilities.description: Attacking from behind slows enemies by 16% (8% if Ranged) and deals 20 more damage. Slow lasts 2 second(s).

occult_bracelet.name: Occult Bracelet
occult_bracelet.lore: A band that bears effigy of the dark goddess Eloshar's unsleeping eye.

abilities.title: Rites of Eloshar
abilities.description: Each time the wearer is attacked, they gain a stack of 0.4 mana regen, up to 5 stacks. Stacks last for 5 seconds.

abilities.title: Ogre Seal Flop
abilities.description: Flop forward like an ogre seal 2 times, dealing 250 damage and slowing enemies in a 275 radius by -100% for 1.5 second on each bounce. 400 bounce distance.

harpoon.name: Harpoon
harpoon.lore: A perfect solution for the flight of foes.

abilities.title: Draw Forth
abilities.description: When targeting an enemy, fire a harpoon at them, that pulls you and the target closer together, up to 35% of the distance between you and your target. If the caster is melee, the hero and target are always pulled to within melee distance of each other. Targeting a tree always pulls you all the way to that tree.

abilities.title: Echo Strike
abilities.description: Causes melee attacks to attack twice in quick succession. The double attacks apply a 100% movement slow for 1 seconds on the first strike. Echo Strike cooldown: 5s

abilities.title: Reciprocity
abilities.description: When attacked, the hero counter-attacks a target within their attack range for 80% of their regular attack damage.

eye_of_the_vizier.name: Eye of the Vizier
eye_of_the_vizier.lore: The ring of a cunning court mage who imprisoned a cadre of enemies to serve as his personal mana reserve.

dagger_of_ristul.name: Dagger of Ristul
dagger_of_ristul.lore: A sinister shiv that grants favor to those willing to stain its blade with a sacrifice of their own blood.

abilities.title: Imbrue
abilities.description: Consume health to temporarily gain 25 damage for 8 seconds.

ofrenda.name: Beloved Memory
ofrenda.lore: Take joy in remembering those beloved who've passed now beyond the veil.

abilities.title: Honor the Dead
abilities.description: Place this Offering on an Altar to honor the dead with a memory from those they left behind.

ofrenda_shovel.name: Scrying Shovel
ofrenda_shovel.lore: You don't know where it came from, but it knows where you need to go. All you need to do is dig.

abilities.title: Dig
abilities.description: Search the map for Offerings to the dead.

ofrenda_pledge.name: Forebearer's Fortune
ofrenda_pledge.lore: This item seems unstable. Like it might just disappear.

abilities.title: Undying Promise
abilities.description: Signal to the spirits of the other realm your commitment to honoring them. If everyone in the battle makes an Undying Promise before the fight begins, the dead might be willing to listen.

muertas_gun.name: Mercy & Grace
muertas_gun.lore: One to deliver the body, the other to claim the soul.
muertas_gun.notes:
Feared enemies are phased and unslowable.
The ricochet will travel 1x Dead Shot's cast range.

abilities.title: Dead Shot
abilities.description: Fires a ghostly bullet at an enemy unit or tree. When the bullet strikes it will deal 300 damage and slow the target by -100% for 0.5 seconds, then ricochet in the vector-targeted direction. The ricochet will damage all units that it passes through, stopping when it hits a hero. Heroes hit by the ricochet will be feared for 2 seconds in the direction of the shot.

tier1_token.name: Tier 1 Token
hint: Activate to redeem a Tier 1 Neutral Item. The resulting neutral item isn't shareable and a hero can only redeem a single token per tier.

tier2_token.name: Tier 2 Token
hint: Activate to redeem a Tier 2 Neutral Item. The resulting neutral item isn't shareable and a hero can only redeem a single token per tier.

tier3_token.name: Tier 3 Token
hint: Activate to redeem a Tier 3 Neutral Item. The resulting neutral item isn't shareable and a hero can only redeem a single token per tier.

tier4_token.name: Tier 4 Token
hint: Activate to redeem a Tier 4 Neutral Item. The resulting neutral item isn't shareable and a hero can only redeem a single token per tier.

tier5_token.name: Tier 5 Token
hint: Activate to redeem a Tier 5 Neutral Item. The resulting neutral item isn't shareable and a hero can only redeem a single token per tier.

abilities.title: Vengeance
abilities.description: Provides 30 damage if equipped hero is Silenced and 20 armor if equipped hero is Stunned.

abilities.title: Boldness
abilities.description: Grants 20 attack speed as long as there are enemy heroes within 1200 units.

abilities.title: Ancient Power
abilities.description: Grants 50 extra bonus damage as long as the unit is within 2000 range of an ancient.

abilities.title: Bubbled Up
abilities.description: Equipped Hero has a 100 HP Barrier against enemy damage. Barrier fully regenerates after not receiving damage for 8 seconds. Self-inflicted damage bypasses the barrier.

whisper_of_the_dread.name: Whisper of the Dread
whisper_of_the_dread.lore: The air that passes through this amulet makes a dreadful sound.

abilities.title: Tunnel Vision
abilities.description: Equipped Hero has their daytime vision reduced by 15% but their Spell damage increased by 10%.

abilities.title: Glass Cannon
abilities.description: Hero takes 6% more damage from all sources.

abilities.title: Glassify
abilities.description: When attacking a hero, apply a debuff increasing the damage received by that hero by 12% for 5 seconds. Only one target can be affected by Glassify at the same time.

abilities.title: Free Bird
abilities.description: When equipped hero is below 30% HP, they gain flying movement.

abilities.title: Unwavering
abilities.description: Hero's Max Health is set to 1800 and can't be altered by other effects or attributes.

abilities.title: Magical Damage Block
abilities.description: Every 12s, blocks up to 300 magic damage from damage instances over 75 damage.

martyrs_plate.name: Martyr's Plate
martyrs_plate.notes: Damage done by this item is considered reflected damage. Reflected damage does not provide any lifesteal and cannot be reflected.

abilities.title: Martyrdom
abilities.description: Redirect 25% of all magic damage dealt to your allied heroes within 900 radius towards you for 10 seconds.

abilities.title: Sixth Sense
abilities.description: Automatically dodge an attack from an enemy hero.

rattlecage.name: Rattlecage
rattlecage.notes: Damage done by this item is considered reflected damage. Reflected damage does not provide any lifesteal and cannot be reflected.

abilities.title: Reverberate
abilities.description: After taking 220 damage from any source, the wearer fires a projectile at up to 2 random enemies in a 600 radius, prioritizing heroes, that deal 110 physical damage and slow the targets movement and attack speed by 100% for 0.2s.

abilities.title: Flip
abilities.description: Toggle to convert 30% of your Max Health to Max Mana, or 30% of your Max Mana to Max Health.

abilities.title: Place Banner
abilities.description:
Creates a banner at the target location. Lane creeps in the area of effect become damage immune while the Banner is up. Lasts 120 seconds.

 Can be destroyed. Melee hero attacks deal 2x damage to the banner.

abilities.title: Profane Knowledge
abilities.description:
Hero kills and assists empower the Black Grimoire, granting it charges. Right-click to consume and grant 200 experience per charge. Starts on cooldown. 
This item cannot be dropped.

grisgris.name: Gris-Gris
hint: This item that cannot be dropped or placed in the backpack but can be put into normal inventory slots. When the owner dies, 100% of the gold lost from death is added to the item, and will be refunded when the item is consumed. Right-click to consume and permanently remove the item.

enhancement_fleetfooted.name: Fleetfooted
enhancement_fleetfooted.notes: Does not stack with Movement Speed bonuses from boots

enhancement_evolved.name: Evolved
enhancement_evolved.notes: Grants +24 to each attribute for Universal Heroes.

unrelenting_eye.name: Unrelenting Eye
unrelenting_eye.lore: A serpent's eye the size of a melon (and just as moist).

abilities.title: Relentless
abilities.description: Increases slow resistance by 50%. This bonus is reduced by 10% for every enemy hero within the wearer's attack radius.

mana_draught.name: Mana Draught
mana_draught.lore: A refreshing drink best shared with friends.

abilities.title: Bottoms Up
abilities.description:
Restores 70 + 3% of the caster's maximum mana over 6 seconds. If the hero is attacked by an enemy hero or Roshan, the effect is lost.

Hold Control to use on an allied hero.

abilities.title: Fill Up
abilities.description: Cooldown Speed of Mana Draught is increased by 30% while in water.

rippers_lash.name: Ripper's Lash
rippers_lash.lore: The Fae horticulturists of Revtel are known to push the boundaries of both cross pollination and safety.

abilities.title: Flay
abilities.description: Embeds thorns into all enemies in a 200 unit radius. Affected units take additional damage when attacked for 10 seconds.

crippling_crossbow.name: Crippling Crossbow
crippling_crossbow.lore: The ever-weeping woodgrain of this crossbow coats every bolt in a potent but short-lived narcotic sap.

abilities.title: Hobble
abilities.description: Hits an enemy for 25 damage, then slows them by 50% and reduces Health Restoration by 40% for 4 seconds. The slow gradually fades over the duration of the spell.

gale_guard.name: Gale Guard
gale_guard.lore: If one truly listens, they can always rely upon the wind to make its will known.

abilities.title: Cyclonic Shield
abilities.description: Envelops the caster in an all damage barrier that absorbs 75% of incoming damage up to a max of 225. Lasts for up to 10 seconds and while the barrier is active you have 50% Slow Resistance.

gunpowder_gauntlets.name: Gunpowder Gauntlet
gunpowder_gauntlets.lore: A 'harmless' prank that went entirely too far.

abilities.title: Beat the Crowd
abilities.description: Your next attack deals an additional 120 magic damage and splashes to units within 250 units for 50% of the original attack's damage plus the additional magic damage.

searing_signet.name: Searing Signet
searing_signet.lore: To torture a magic user, one must devise means far beyond the mundane.
searing_signet.notes: Will not ignite enemies that are more than 2000 range away.

abilities.title: Burn Through
abilities.description: Instances of magic damage from spells over 60 ignites enemies, causing them to take 80 magic damage over 6 seconds. Burn damage against non-hero targets is decreased by 50%.

serrated_shiv.name: Serrated Shiv
serrated_shiv.lore: Too dangerous for taskwork, this blade's only purpose is vile murder.

abilities.title: Gut 'Em
abilities.description: Attacks have a 20% chance to have True Strike and deal 8% of the target's current health as bonus physical damage. Deals a flat bonus of 200 against Roshan.

polliwog_charm.name: Pollywog Charm
polliwog_charm.lore: A tiny trinket that wriggles when wet.

abilities.title: Ribbit
abilities.description: Increases the health regeneration of a target ally by 8 for 14 seconds. While standing in water, the blessed unit also moves 10% faster.

abilities.title: Keen Eye
abilities.description: Increases cast range by 100 and attack range by 100 (Melee & Ranged). Taking over 25 damage from a player controlled source or Roshan disables this effect for 6 seconds.

pyrrhic_cloak.name: Pyrrhic Cloak
pyrrhic_cloak.lore: There are generals that care far less about the survival of their troops than the destruction of their enemies.
pyrrhic_cloak.notes: Damage done by this item is considered reflected damage. Reflected damage does not provide any lifesteal and cannot be reflected.

abilities.title: Retribution
abilities.description: For the next 6 seconds, 75% of damage taken by the caster is reflected to the target unit as physical damage if they are within 1200 units away.

madstone_bundle.name: Madstone Bundle
hint: Collect to craft new Neutral Items.

kobold_cup.name: Kobold Cup
kobold_cup.lore: The Kobold King will sip when he damn well pleases.

abilities.title: One for the Road
abilities.description: Increases movement speed of all allied units by 10% in a 1000 unit radius around the caster for 6 seconds.

dormant_curio.name: Dormant Curio
dormant_curio.lore: Everyone has an idea, but no one has a clue.
dormant_curio.notes: Certain stats on the next artifact will be amplified. Will not amplify cooldown, mana cost, or cast range.

abilities.title: Hidden Potential
abilities.description: Neutral Artifacts you craft while holding a Dormant Curio have their potency increased by 30%.

sisters_shroud.name: Sister's Shroud
sisters_shroud.lore: A pall that draped the sarcophagus of the First Sister.
sisters_shroud.notes: Does not trigger from damage by non-player controlled creeps

abilities.title: Veiled
abilities.description: When falling below 50% HP, gain 150% evasion for 5 seconds. While active, dodging an attack decreases the evasion bonus by 75% of its current value.

abilities.title: Last Caress
abilities.description: Veiled cooldown is only reset if the wearer dies or kills an enemy hero.

jidi_pollen_bag.name: Jidi Pollen Bag
jidi_pollen_bag.lore: Very dangerous. Very difficult to obtain more.
jidi_pollen_bag.notes: Damage is non-lethal and classified as HP Loss.

abilities.title: Pollinate
abilities.description: Spreads pollen on all enemy units in a 700 unit radius for 9 seconds, decreasing their health restoration by 50% and dealing damage equal to 9% of their maximum health per second.

outworld_staff.name: Outworld Staff
outworld_staff.lore: Proof that the lone sentinel was not always so.
outworld_staff.notes: Damage taken when returning is non-lethal and disables Blink Dagger and other items that are muted upon taking damage.

abilities.title: Self-Exile
abilities.description: Makes the caster completely invulnerable and disabled for 0.7 seconds. When returning to the world, the caster takes 5% of their maximum health as damage.

dezun_bloodrite.name: Dezun Bloodrite
dezun_bloodrite.lore: The gateway to a lost lineage of power, unlocked only with blood.

abilities.title: Blood Invocation
abilities.description: Spells have a 16% larger Area of Effect, but now additionally cost health equal to 35% of their mana cost.

abilities.title: Crushing Blow
abilities.description: Empowers the next attack to be a critical hit dealing 150% damage. Hitting an enemy with an empowered attack temporarily decreases their movement speed by 10%, attack speed by 15%, and cast speed by 20% for 3 seconds.

divine_regalia.name: Divine Regalia
divine_regalia.lore: So magnificent, it cannot abide failure.

abilities.title: Exalted
abilities.description: Increases outgoing damage by 20%. Dying permanently disables this Neutral Item and the current Enchantment is lost.

abilities.title: Fallen
abilities.description: You have died and thus get nothing.

furion_gold_bag.name: Bag of Gold
hint: Contains gold

specialists_array.name: Specialist's Array
specialists_array.lore: An impressive kit of trigger enhancements born in an aging assassin's idle mind.

abilities.title: Splitshot
abilities.description: Ranged attacks have a 30% chance to fire additional projectiles at up to 2 nearby enemies with 150 extra range and within a 120 degree angle in front of the attacker. The additional projectiles deal 20 + 75% damage of a normal attack and do not trigger on hit effects. The primary attack deals 20 + 100% damage of a normal attack.

hydras_breath.name: Hydra's Breath
hydras_breath.notes: Attack Range bonuses from Dragon Lance and its upgrades do not stack.

abilities.title: Miasma
abilities.description: Attacks poison enemies, dealing 2.5% of the target's Max HP as Magical Damage per second for 3 seconds.

abilities.title: Polycephaly
abilities.description: Ranged attacks have a 30% chance to fire additional projectiles at up to 3 nearby enemies with 150 extra range and within a 120 degree angle in front of the attacker. The additional projectiles deal 20 + 75% damage of a normal attack and do not trigger on hit effects except for Miasma. The primary attack deals 20 + 100% damage of a normal attack.

abilities.title: Loaded
abilities.description: Increases your base damage maximum by 6. When calculating your base damage or creep bounty from last hits, the value is computed 2 times and the highest value is taken.

abilities.title: Shield Wall
abilities.description: Reduce your own movement speed by 20 to provide a 160 physical damage barrier to allied player controlled units in a 800 unit radius. Lasts for 6 seconds.

abilities.title: Refract
abilities.description: Spend 8% of your current life total to create a full health illusion that lasts for 20 seconds. The illusion has 50% outgoing damage and takes 200% of incoming damage.

abilities.title: Pupate
abilities.description: Enter into an insect form for 5 seconds, increasing magic resistance by 50% and movement speed by 15%. While an insect, your size is decreased and your armor is reduced by 45%.

abilities.title: False Flight
abilities.description: Gain 50% slow resistance, phased movement, and 25% evasion for 5 seconds.

abilities.title: Bloodthirst
abilities.description: Gain 15% base damage and 30 attack speed for 6 seconds.

abilities.title: Bloodrush
abilities.description: Enemy heroes dying within 1200 units reset the cooldown of Bloodthirst.

abilities.title: Salvo
abilities.description: 20% of the mana used to cast abilities is recovered over 10 seconds.

abilities.title: Linger
abilities.description: 30% of incoming damage is delayed over 5 seconds.

abilities.title: Transmogrify
abilities.description:
Toggle to switch the contents of the Satchel between a pound of Feathers or Rocks.

Feathers: increase movement speed by 12 and distance of forced movement effects applied to the wearer by 30%.

Rocks: increase armor by 3 and decrease the distance of forced movement effects applied to the wearer by 30%.

abilities.title: Enchant
abilities.description: Increases the bonuses of the item's Neutral Enchantment by 15%. Every time this item is crafted again the bonus is increased by 40%.

harmonizer.name: Harmonizer
harmonizer.notes: Only considers abilities that are visible and have a cooldown

abilities.title: Balance
abilities.description: Gain 5% spell manacost reduction for every spell off cooldown and 6% spell amplification for every spell on cooldown.

abilities.title: Spellover
abilities.description: Dealing 100 spell damage to an enemy causes them to overheat and deal damage to their allies in a 300 unit radius. Hero targets deal 40 damage to their allies, other targets deal 15 damage.

abilities.title: Forage
abilities.description: When the cooldown is ready, nearby trees that can be foraged will appear. By standing next to a tree for 1s, you can forage the tree and find flora, fungi or a bag of gold containing 30 gold.

foragers_health.name: Vital Toadstool
foragers_health.notes: Hold Control to use on a nearby allied hero.

abilities.title: Munch
abilities.description:
Grants 1% max health regeneration to the target for 10 seconds.

If the unit is attacked by an enemy hero or Roshan, the effect is lost.

foragers_stats.name: Ironwood Nut
foragers_stats.notes: Universal heroes get 0.4 bonus to all attributes.

abilities.title: Munch
abilities.description: Grants 1 permanent primary attribute.

foragers_mana.name: Tomo'kan Ringcap
foragers_mana.notes: Hold Control to use on a nearby allied hero.

abilities.title: Munch
abilities.description: Instantly restores 50 mana + 5% of the target's max mana when consumed

chasm_stone.name: Chasm Stone
chasm_stone.notes: AoE bonuses from multiple Chasm Stones or its upgrades do not stack.

partisans_brand.name: Partisan's Brand
partisans_brand.notes: Player controlled units includes heroes and any creep summoned or converted by them.

abilities.title: Brand
abilities.description: Increases spell damage dealt to player controlled units by 9%.

tidehunter_fish.name: Leviathan's Fish
hint: Yummy Fish

diffusal_blade_2.name: Diffusal Blade
diffusal_blade_2.lore: An enchanted blade that allows the user to cut straight into the enemy's soul.
diffusal_blade_2.notes: Does not stack with other manabreak abilities.
